SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_SCAR_POWER.title: Linden Scar
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_SCAR_POWER.descrip: #Each time an attack pierces your Dragon Scales, gain 1 Dragon Scale and this much NP Charge.

SIEGFRIEDSABER-WEIGHT_OF_EXPECTATIONS_PO: #At the end of your turn, if you played no Attacks, gain NP Charge and 1 Dragon Scale. Up to 2 triggers per turn.
